1. Do The Work
2. Show Up Hungry
3. Not Use Your Current Or Past Sitation As An Excuse
4. Not Make Someone Else Responsible For Your Results
5. Be Polite To Your Naysayers
6. Only Compare You, To You
7. Earnestly Attempt To Answer All Questions On Your Own
8. Buy Success With Your Own Time
9. Take Imperfect Action, Viciously
10. Not Freak Out At The Clock
11. Choose to Get Uncomfortable Everyday
12. Be Brutally Honest About Where You Are
13. Kill Parts Of Your Old Self (If Not All)
14. Lean In
Show You What Work Matters
Match Your Hunger
Call You Out On Your B.S.
Not Do It For You
Make A Safehouse
Only Compare You, To You
Coach You To The Answers
Dedicate Myself To Guiding You
Not Wait For Perfection
Use The Clock To Push Results
Create Environments For Positive Stress
Applaude Your Progress
Ask If You’re Satisfied With You
Lean In
RULES OF THE CHALLENGE
IF YOU WILL: 	THEN I WILL:
I AM FIRST, YOUR COACH...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
